summary: Phase 2 full coverage: 11/11 backend pytest tests PASS (scrape e2e on books.toscrape short URL, products scoping+404, logs latest-first+level filter, SSE with/without token, concurrency guard 3 running + 2 queued, invalid-host job marked failed with error, DELETE on running job stops cleanly, lifespan context manager confirmed). Frontend JobDetail page PASS: login, navigate to job, metrics + logs panel render, SSE logs appear, INFO level filter narrows, copy/delete controls visible, nav-away unmounts cleanly. Previous Phase 1 suite (14 tests) untouched and still valid.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:263 Pydantic field 'error: Optional[str] = None' — returning null as required field works; OK.

worker.py _run_job: catches asyncio.CancelledError only at consumer level, not inside scrape loop. Job deletion is detected via periodic is_cancelled() polling inside scraper — works but cancellation latency depends on page iteration; observed test passed within ~1 page.
server.py stream_logs: terminal-detect requires idle_ticks>6 (~3s) after catch-up before emitting 'event: end'. Good to avoid premature close.
SSE replay caps at last 50 entries before tailing — fine for UX.
Pydantic v2 use_enum_values / field_validator in use; correct.
Index on logs is (job_id, ts) — supports ordered tail queries efficiently.
No rate limit on POST /api/jobs; future concern if multi-tenant.
seed_data_creation: Test-created jobs cleaned up by DELETE. Several completed/failed jobs remain in dashboard from earlier manual runs (harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 scraper + worker pool + SSE verified green. Short test URL https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books_1/page-1.html completes in ~5-10s with 20 products. Full books.toscrape.com run (~90s) not retested here to save time but was manually verified by dev. Unreachable-host edge case confirmed fixed: job ends status='failed' with non-null error. Concurrency guard behaves correctly (<=3 running). SSE requires ?token query param; no-token returns 401. Lifespan handler in use (no @app.on_event anywhere in server.py). Phase 3 will add product table + CSV download.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found; all 16 review-request items verified pass.
